title: Canmore Townhouse STR
definition: Townhouse-style STR in Canmore often lands near break-even — roughly +$150/month in this scenario, with little room for error.
reality_check: Shared walls and HOA rules matter
Parking and hot tubs affect maintenance
Noise and bylaws can cap nights

good_for: Buyers valuing space over condo tower

faq.a: Not always — but it means small misses flip you negative; budget reserves accordingly.
Sometimes on rate; fees and bylaws still decide net.
Special assessments and insurance step-ups in multi-unit communities.
